cases.title: TS-21d: Bootstrap first admin — POST /setup/first-admin on empty DB creates TrainingOfficeAdmin and session
preconditions: PostgreSQL database with zero rows in users table (User.count = 0)
SEED_ENABLED=false or equivalent so no seed users exist
API running at /api/v1
steps: GET /api/v1/setup/status without session cookie
Assert HTTP 200 and body { needsSetup: true }
POST /api/v1/setup/first-admin with valid institutionalId ADMIN001, displayName, email admin@example.edu.vn, password (≥8 chars)
Assert HTTP 201 Created and Set-Cookie wecheck_session present
GET /api/v1/auth/me using session cookie
Assert role TrainingOfficeAdmin and email matches submitted value
GET /api/v1/setup/status and assert needsSetup false
cases.expected: Testing-plan TS-21d and AC-17b satisfied: first admin bootstrap on empty DB creates TrainingOfficeAdmin, establishes session, and flips needsSetup to false

cases.title: SetupService.getStatus returns needsSetup true when UserRepository count is zero
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database with users table truncated or empty
identity-auth SetupService wired to UserRepository per module breakdown §2.1
steps: Query users table and assert row count === 0
Invoke SetupService.getStatus() or equivalent module API
Assert returned needsSetup === true
Seed one TrainingOfficeAdmin via repository insert in separate transaction
Invoke SetupService.getStatus() again
Assert returned needsSetup === false
cases.expected: Tag-specific integration hint satisfied: module boundary reflects User.count = 0 as needsSetup true per FR-17 and BR-13

cases.title: SetupService.createFirstAdmin persists TrainingOfficeAdmin, auth session, and rejects repeat when count > 0
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with User.count = 0
SetupService.createFirstAdmin available with password hashing per UserService
steps: Invoke createFirstAdmin with valid DTO (institutionalId, displayName, email, password)
Query users table and assert exactly one row with role TrainingOfficeAdmin and hashed password
Query auth_sessions table and assert session row linked to new userId
Invoke createFirstAdmin again with different valid DTO
Assert domain error SetupAlreadyComplete thrown and users table count remains 1
cases.expected: Module-integration: bootstrap creates exactly one admin user and session; second attempt rejected at service layer per BR-13 one-time rule

cases.title: Tag-specific integration: POST /setup/first-admin handler returns 403 SetupAlreadyComplete after bootstrap complete
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with one existing TrainingOfficeAdmin user (bootstrap already complete)
SetupController or HTTP adapter mounted for integration test
steps: Assert User.count > 0 and SetupService.getStatus returns needsSetup false
POST /api/v1/setup/first-admin with valid new-admin payload (no session cookie)
Assert HTTP 403 Forbidden
Assert response errorCode SetupAlreadyComplete per API design §2.0
Query users table and assert no additional user row created
cases.expected: Tag-specific integration hint satisfied: repeat bootstrap POST rejected with 403 after first admin exists

cases.title: Deployment bootstrap state transitions needsSetup true to false after first admin commit
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with beforeState: User.count = 0 and needsSetup true
SetupService.createFirstAdmin transactional path available
steps: Record beforeState: GET setup status → needsSetup true; users count 0
Execute createFirstAdmin transaction to completion
Record afterState: users count 1; role TrainingOfficeAdmin
Assert needsSetup false on subsequent status check
Attempt createFirstAdmin and assert SetupAlreadyComplete without state rollback
cases.expected: State transition: deployment gate moves from bootstrap-required (needsSetup true) to login-available (needsSetup false) after exactly one admin user committed

cases.title: GET /setup/status returns 200 JSON envelope with needsSetup boolean
preconditions: Empty database (needsSetup true scenario) and post-bootstrap database (needsSetup false scenario) available as separate test fixtures
steps: Send GET /api/v1/setup/status without authentication on empty DB fixture
Assert HTTP 200 OK and Content-Type application/json
Assert response body exactly { needsSetup: true } per API design §2.0
Switch to post-bootstrap fixture with one admin user
Send GET /api/v1/setup/status
Assert HTTP 200 and body { needsSetup: false }
cases.expected: HTTP contract for GET /setup/status: 200 success with needsSetup flag reflecting User.count per API design §2.0

cases.title: POST /setup/first-admin returns 201 with session cookie on empty DB
preconditions: Empty database; no session cookie present
Valid setup payload per validation rules §3.1a
steps: Send POST /api/v1/setup/first-admin with Content-Type application/json and body { institutionalId, displayName, email, password }
Assert HTTP 201 Created
Assert Set-Cookie header contains wecheck_session HTTP-only cookie (same as login per API design §2.0)
Assert response body includes created user DTO with role TrainingOfficeAdmin and no password fields
GET /api/v1/auth/me with session cookie and assert authenticated admin identity
cases.expected: HTTP 201 contract for successful bootstrap; session cookie issued identically to POST /auth/login success path

cases.title: Tag-specific e2e: GET /setup/status needsSetup true on empty DB; repeat POST returns SetupAlreadyComplete
preconditions: Fresh empty database with User.count = 0
Valid first-admin credentials prepared
steps: GET /api/v1/setup/status and assert needsSetup true (tag-specific e2e hint)
POST /api/v1/setup/first-admin with valid payload and capture session cookie
Assert HTTP 201 and user role TrainingOfficeAdmin
POST /api/v1/setup/first-admin again with different valid payload (no or stale cookie)
Assert HTTP 403 with errorCode SetupAlreadyComplete (tag-specific e2e hint)
GET /api/v1/setup/status and assert needsSetup false
cases.expected: Tag-specific e2e hints satisfied: empty DB reports needsSetup true; successful bootstrap; repeat POST rejected SetupAlreadyComplete

cases.title: Unauthenticated visitor denied /setup route access when needsSetup false (403 or redirect to login)
preconditions: Bootstrap complete: at least one user exists; needsSetup false
No session cookie; unauthenticated visitor context
steps: GET /api/v1/setup/status and assert needsSetup false
Navigate or request GET /setup page route without session
Assert HTTP 403 Forbidden or redirect to /login per roles-permissions §2.3b and AC-17c
If JSON API route guard exists, assert errorCode Forbidden or equivalent bootstrap-closed response
Verify SetupAdminForm is not rendered and no bootstrap fields exposed
cases.expected: /setup is public only when needsSetup true; after bootstrap unauthenticated access denied per FR-17 route permission table

cases.title: AC-17d: Concurrent setup POST with identical email yields single admin and validation or bootstrap-closed error
preconditions: Empty database (User.count = 0); needsSetup true
Two payloads sharing email dup@example.edu.vn but different institutionalId values (ADMIN001, ADMIN002)
steps: Fire two parallel POST /api/v1/setup/first-admin requests with identical email and distinct institutionalIds on empty DB
Assert exactly one HTTP 201 Created response with wecheck_session cookie
Assert the other response is HTTP 422 ValidationFailed with duplicate email field detail OR HTTP 403 SetupAlreadyComplete if first transaction committed
Query users table and assert User.count === 1
GET /api/v1/setup/status and assert needsSetup false
cases.expected: AC-17d edge: duplicate email on bootstrap rejected; at most one TrainingOfficeAdmin persisted

cases.title: POST /setup/first-admin when users exist returns 403 SetupAlreadyComplete (not 404 or 422)
preconditions: Database with User.count >= 1 from prior bootstrap or seed
needsSetup false
steps: POST /api/v1/setup/first-admin with valid institutionalId, displayName, email, password
Assert HTTP 403 Forbidden (not 201, not 422)
Assert response errorCode SetupAlreadyComplete per API design §2.0 and error-handling §2.4
Assert Vietnamese user-facing message present and no stack trace
Verify User.count unchanged after rejected request
cases.expected: Bootstrap repeat boundary: SetupAlreadyComplete at HTTP 403 when deployment already has users per AC-17c and BR-13

cases.title: Parallel POST /setup/first-admin requests create at most one admin user
preconditions: Empty PostgreSQL database
Two or more concurrent valid setup payloads with unique emails and institutionalIds
steps: Fire parallel POST /api/v1/setup/first-admin requests (Promise.all or load tool) against empty DB
Collect HTTP status codes from all responses
Assert exactly one response is 201 Created with session cookie
Assert all other responses are 403 SetupAlreadyComplete or equivalent conflict rejection
Query users table and assert User.count === 1 with role TrainingOfficeAdmin
cases.expected: BR-13 exactly-one bootstrap invariant holds under concurrent requests; no duplicate admin rows

cases.title: Tag-specific browser-journey: / redirects to /setup when needsSetup; successful form lands on /admin hub
preconditions: Web app running with empty database (needsSetup true)
No session cookie in browser
steps: Navigate browser to / (root route)
Assert URL redirects to /setup per AC-17a and user flows §12 step 1
Assert SetupAdminForm visible with fields Mã cán bộ, Họ và tên, Email, Mật khẩu
Assert login link to /login is hidden or disabled per forms-validation-ux §4.1a
Fill valid setup fields and submit form
Assert POST /api/v1/setup/first-admin succeeds and browser navigates to /admin hub
Assert admin session active (e.g. admin layout chrome or Trang chủ visible)
cases.expected: Tag-specific browser-journey hint satisfied: root redirect to /setup when needsSetup; post-submit lands on /admin with session established per AC-17b

cases.title: Tag-specific browser-journey: authenticated admin lands on /admin hub with permission-filtered NavCards
preconditions: Bootstrap complete; TrainingOfficeAdmin session cookie set in browser
Admin user holds full admin permission set per roles-permissions §2.2
steps: Navigate browser to /admin (or follow post-bootstrap redirect)
Assert RoleHomeHub renders with Vietnamese heading and quick-link cards
Assert cards for Quản lý người dùng, Danh sách lớp, and other permitted destinations visible per page-list §5.0
Inspect DOM for NavCard href values and assert each points to permitted /admin/* route
Remove one permission from test admin (e.g. policy:write) and reload /admin
Assert Chính sách card omitted from DOM (not merely disabled) per BR-14
cases.expected: Tag-specific browser-journey hint satisfied: post-bootstrap admin lands on /admin hub; cards filtered by permission per FR-18 and page-list §5.0

cases.title: Tag-specific browser-journey: instructor layout chrome contains zero href matching /admin
preconditions: Instructor user exists and is authenticated in browser
Instructor session on /sessions or role home route
steps: Navigate authenticated Instructor to /sessions (instructor role home)
Query all anchor elements in InstructorLayout chrome (sidebar, header, bottom nav if present)
Assert zero href attributes match /admin or /admin/* pattern
Inspect RoleHomeHub or quick links on instructor home if present; assert no admin destinations
Optional: direct navigate to /admin/users and assert ForbiddenPage without admin nav leaked in chrome
cases.expected: Tag-specific browser-journey hint satisfied: instructor chrome contains zero /admin links per BR-14 and testing-plan TS-21f pattern

cases.title: AC-17c browser: /setup unavailable after bootstrap — redirects to login or shows forbidden
preconditions: Bootstrap already complete (needsSetup false)
Browser has no active session or expired session
steps: Navigate browser directly to /setup
Assert user is redirected to /login OR sees forbidden/unavailable state (not SetupAdminForm)
Assert no institutional ID / password setup fields rendered
Attempt navigation to / from unauthenticated state
Assert redirect to /login (not /setup) when needsSetup false
cases.expected: AC-17c UI outcome: /setup not available after bootstrap; visitor directed to login flow instead of setup form
